description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that tests code on every push across multiple Python versions and OS environments, then deploys to PyPI when a tag is pushed. The test job uses a matrix strategy to test on ubuntu-latest with Python 3.8, 3.9, 3.10, and 3.11, while the deploy job uses a matrix with Python 3.9. Both jobs use Miniconda for environment setup and run tests or build and publish packages accordingly.
